blocks.text: Match preview: Sri Lanka Women face Scotland Women in 25th Match, Group B (T20) on Fri, 26 Jun, 2026, 11:00 pm at Emirates Old Trafford Manchester. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Sri Lanka Women vs Scotland Women

blocks.text: Classic English seaming conditions when clouds cover; batting paradise in sunshine.
Heavy drizzle · High 35°C / Low 22°C · Rain: 1.3 mm · Wind: up to 19 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
